reasons: overtrading: original produced 3156 trades on 4 pairs over 6 months
negative expectancy: both original (-0.028) and v2 (-0.045) showed negative expectancy
low profit factor: original PF 0.210, v2 PF 0.239 (both below 1.0)
high drawdown: original max drawdown -87.4%, v2 max drawdown -57.2%
v2 did not rescue the family: stricter parameters reduced trades by 60% but strategy remained unprofitable
core hypothesis (volatility compression breakout) does not produce positive expectancy on this sample

root_cause_analysis.compression_timing: measured on same candle as breakout, allowing entries without historical compression verification
root_cause_analysis.breakout_freshness: no fresh breakout requirement, entered on sustained breakouts from hours ago
root_cause_analysis.volume_filter: relative_volume_min 1.25 too permissive for marginal volume
root_cause_analysis.trend_slope: no EMA trend slope requirement, entered on declining but above-EMA price action
root_cause_analysis.atr_extension: loose range (0 to 1.8) allowed zero-extension and over-extended entries
root_cause_analysis.exit_conditions: multiple OR conditions exited too early or too late without prioritization

v2_changes_applied.compression_timing: added compressed_recent check with historical minimum over lookback period
v2_changes_applied.breakout_freshness: added fresh_breakout requirement (current > level AND prior <= prior level)
v2_changes_applied.atr_extension: changed from (0, 1.8) to (0.05, 1.1) to exclude zero and over-extended entries
v2_changes_applied.exit_conditions: renamed and added momentum failure check with price decline detection

recommendation: archive family as rejected, move to next family (trend_pullback_continuation or mean_reversion_exhaustion)
